text.title: AI Product Success Metrics Catalog Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Does this product have ≥1 user-facing AI feature with production traffic?

branch.question: Are session transcripts AND a manual audit sample available?

branch.conclusion: Emit the catalog using `templates/ai-product-success-metrics-catalog.md`. Apply r1-r4 to bound scope, type inputs, name owner, version + last_reviewed. Every metric value cites a source.
Block. Wire telemetry + assemble a 100-row manual audit sample before drafting metrics — untyped or absent inputs produce hallucinated baselines.
Skip. Use the generic success-metrics methodology; the AI-specific catalog adds no value to a non-AI product.
Defer. Wait until ≥50 production sessions exist to baseline the catalog; pre-launch numbers will mislead.

example.p: Code-copilot live for 30 days, 5k sessions, transcripts + 100-row audit sample ready. → conclusion r5-llm-grounding → emit catalog with deflection / intervention / hallucination / time-to-correction / retention.
